announcements.title: iTour.goose is now available!
announcements.body: Now get all the information you need for Goose tour via the new app iTour.goose

announcements.title: Welcome to iTour.phish v9!
announcements.body: We've completely rebuilt the app from the ground up. Enjoy the new features and let us know what you think!

announcements.title: Pro-tip for seeing the setlist!
announcements.body: Long press on the event in the tour list to go directly to the setlist for the show
